content:
@sigil v0 hybrid
G: review(patch)
H: header_spoof_auth_bypass ⇒ Anmaliciouslycrafted"x-user-id"headercouldbeusedtoescalateprivileges.
P: strip_untrusted_header("x-user-id") → prefer(session_userId)
V: validate(req.headers['x-user-id']) ∧ ensure(userId) ∧ test_with_valid_and_invalid_headers
R: ! unauthorized_access ∧ ! session_confusion ∧ ! data_leak
A: Requireauthenticationviatrustedsource ∧ limitaccessviaAPIgateway

[AUDIT]
Treat header_spoof_auth_bypass as a trust-boundary issue and apply strip_untrusted_header("x-user-id") before merge.

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: review(patch)
H: user_id_exposure ⇒ depends_on_http_header
P: validate_header_input → limit_header_source
V: test_with_missing_user_id ∧ check_for_authentication_bypass
R: ! unauthorized_access ∧ ! session_fixation
A: "consider securing x-user-id handling."

[AUDIT]
Treat user_id_exposure as a trust-boundary issue and apply validate_header_input before merge.
